Rebranding Inquiry Form

Thank you for your interest in Helocrene Studio! This is the starting point. The information shared here informs the research, the direction, and ultimately the work, so the more specific, the better.

Your brand

Which of your products or services would you consider your flagship or most important right now?

What values or qualities are most important for your brand to convey?

Who is the ideal customer?

Who are your main competitors?

What sets the brand apart from its competitors?

What misconceptions do people have about your brand?

Business taglines or slogans (if applicable).

The Project

What feeling or impression should the new brand leave?

Are there any existing brand elements to keep or build on? (colours, fonts, main logo, etc.)

Are there any elements to move away from or avoid?

Is there a preferred timeline or any key dates to consider?

What is your estimated project budget?

If you need any add-ons, please add them here.

What kind of printable assets do you need?

What kind of social media assets do you need?

What kind of packaging deliverables do you need?

Do you have existing photography, illustrations, or other visual assets to be included in the project?

Do you have any visual references or inspiration?

Final notes

Thank you for taking the time to fill this out. Everything shared here will be reviewed carefully before we connect, expect to hear back within 1–2 business days.

Thanks for completing this form!

Everything shared here will be reviewed carefully. Expect to hear back within 1–2 business days.
